name: Annual hive registration not completed
short_description: Luxembourg annual hive census/registration not confirmed.
identify_content: No current-year registration record available.
Uncertainty about mandatory annual declaration status.
resolve_now_content: Verify current registration requirement and forms.
Submit required declaration to relevant authority.
resolve_next_content: Store proof of declaration in beekeeper notes.
Set a yearly review routine before season starts.
seek_help_content: Contact Administration vétérinaire / official agriculture contacts if unsure.

name: Hive placement or installation concern
short_description: Hive location or setup may not be safe/compliant.
identify_content: Hive appears unstable, exposed, or poorly oriented.
Apiary constraints raise uncertainty on placement rules.
resolve_now_content: Stabilize hive stand and immediate safety.
Review local guidance before finalizing placement.
resolve_next_content: Adjust location/protection as needed.
Re-check setup during next field visit.
seek_help_content: Ask APIS adviser for practical setup review.

name: Asian hornet pressure
short_description: Invasive predator pressure affecting foraging and colony stress.
identify_content: Hornet sightings near apiary or hive entrance.
Increased defensive behavior or reduced foraging confidence.
resolve_now_content: Increase apiary monitoring and entrance protection where appropriate.
Follow official local hornet reporting/guidance channels.
resolve_next_content: Coordinate with local beekeeper network and update mitigation setup.
Review pressure trend through season.
seek_help_content: Seek APIS/local adviser support when pressure escalates or colonies weaken.

name: Swarm pressure
short_description: Colony showing signs of likely swarming behavior.
identify_content: Crowding and queen cell development signs.
Strong colony with rapid buildup and reduced space.
resolve_now_content: Assess for queen cells and congestion.
Choose observe/add space/split path quickly.
resolve_next_content: Re-inspect soon to confirm pressure reduced.
Transition stage based on outcome.
seek_help_content: Contact APIS adviser if signs are persistent or unclear.

name: Multiple queens suspected
short_description: Possible temporary or unstable multi-queen situation.
identify_content: Conflicting queen signs during inspection.
Supersedure or swarm-related context with unusual behavior.
resolve_now_content: Confirm signs and avoid rushed disruptive intervention.
Increase short-interval monitoring and assess colony stability.
resolve_next_content: Decide whether to split/separate based on follow-up findings.
Move back to stable stage once resolved.
seek_help_content: Consult APIS adviser if uncertainty remains after follow-up.

name: Queen cells present
short_description: Queen cells identified requiring stage decision.
identify_content: Visible queen cells in brood area.
Associated swarm/supersedure indicators.
resolve_now_content: Classify situation and decide observe/space/split path.
Document decision in hive notes.
resolve_next_content: Re-check colony at short interval.
Update stage according to development.
seek_help_content: Seek adviser support if decision confidence is low.

name: Queen missing / queen problem
short_description: Potential queen loss or dysfunction signs.
identify_content: Irregular brood pattern and missing normal queen-right signs.
Behavior indicates colony instability.
resolve_now_content: Confirm indicators carefully and reduce additional stress.
Prioritize stabilization and monitoring plan.
resolve_next_content: Decide intervention path with local adviser support.
Re-stage hive after stabilization.
seek_help_content: Seek APIS adviser rapidly if colony decline appears likely.

name: Low stores / starvation risk
short_description: Insufficient food stores for current conditions.
identify_content: Light hive feel and weak foraging/colony signs.
Seasonal gap with limited natural forage.
resolve_now_content: Confirm food deficit and apply immediate feeding strategy as appropriate.
Minimize stress during intervention.
resolve_next_content: Re-check stores soon and adapt feeding plan.
Track transition into safer store levels.
seek_help_content: Get APIS/local support if colony remains weak.

name: Cold snap stress
short_description: Sudden cold affects spring development and activity.
identify_content: Abrupt temperature drop during startup/buildup period.
Reduced activity after earlier warm period.
resolve_now_content: Avoid unnecessary hive opening during cold event.
Prioritize colony warmth and disturbance reduction.
resolve_next_content: Reassess once conditions stabilize.
Adjust short-term stage expectations.
seek_help_content: Consult local adviser if repeated stress signs continue.

name: Weak colony
short_description: Colony growth or vitality is below expected seasonal baseline.
identify_content: Low bee population relative to stage.
Poor progression during normally active period.
resolve_now_content: Verify queen-right and brood pattern basics.
Reduce avoidable stressors and support colony needs.
resolve_next_content: Track recovery over short interval.
Escalate if no improvement.
seek_help_content: Use APIS disease/advisory pathways if suspicion increases.

name: Poor buildup
short_description: Expected population expansion is not occurring.
identify_content: Slow or stalled colony growth.
Mismatch between season and colony development.
resolve_now_content: Check food, queen status, and environment constraints.
Apply targeted support actions.
resolve_next_content: Reassess whether hive can enter Expansion.
Adjust stage if colony remains delayed.
seek_help_content: Ask APIS adviser for localized diagnostic support.

name: Heat stress
short_description: High temperatures increase colony stress and management pressure.
identify_content: Sustained high temperatures and visible stress behavior.
Reduced normal activity patterns in hot periods.
resolve_now_content: Improve shade/ventilation conditions where possible.
Avoid disruptive interventions during peak heat.
resolve_next_content: Monitor for recovery as weather changes.
Integrate heat mitigation into apiary setup.
seek_help_content: Consult local network if repeated heat events impact colony strength.

name: Robbing pressure
short_description: Increased robbing risk around post-harvest period.
identify_content: Agitated entrance behavior and signs of inter-colony conflict.
Seasonal context after extraction or dearth.
resolve_now_content: Reduce entrances and avoid exposing feed/honey.
Stabilize hive environment quickly.
resolve_next_content: Continue short-term monitoring.
Adapt apiary handling routines to reduce triggers.
seek_help_content: Seek adviser support if loss risk remains high.

name: Hive damage
short_description: Physical hive body/equipment damage affecting colony safety.
identify_content: Visible cracks, instability, or broken components.
Weather/predator impact signs.
resolve_now_content: Stabilize hive and protect colony from exposure.
Repair or replace critical parts.
resolve_next_content: Inspect broader apiary for similar risks.
Improve preventive maintenance routine.
seek_help_content: Ask experienced local beekeeper/APIS adviser if major damage.

name: Mice entry risk
short_description: Rodent intrusion risk during colder periods.
identify_content: Signs of disturbance near entrance.
Cold-season conditions with inadequate entrance protection.
resolve_now_content: Apply or verify entrance reducers/guards.
Remove attractants and secure hive area.
resolve_next_content: Re-check defenses during winter visits.
Adjust setup if local pressure is high.
seek_help_content: Request local advice for recurring intrusion.

name: Water ingress
short_description: Moisture entering hive due to weather or equipment issues.
identify_content: Visible moisture marks or damp components.
Post-rain/winter signs of poor sealing.
resolve_now_content: Improve cover integrity and drainage immediately.
Limit disturbance while restoring dry conditions.
resolve_next_content: Inspect after next weather event.
Upgrade weatherproofing if recurring.
seek_help_content: Seek experienced support if colony health declines.

name: Storm / wind damage
short_description: Strong wind or storm events threatening hive stability.
identify_content: Recent severe weather event.
Tilted or shifted hive components.
resolve_now_content: Secure hive physically and check immediate colony safety.
Remove hazardous debris around apiary.
resolve_next_content: Reinforce stand/strapping for future events.
Review shelter conditions.
seek_help_content: Get local support for major structural failures.

name: Late winter starvation risk
short_description: Food depletion risk near end of winter before spring flow.
identify_content: Late winter with low remaining stores.
Weakness signs before spring resources improve.
resolve_now_content: Confirm stores and apply emergency feed approach as appropriate.
Keep intervention targeted and minimal.
resolve_next_content: Monitor closely until spring startup conditions return.
Transition to Spring startup with food-check priority.
seek_help_content: Consult APIS adviser when colony remains at risk.
